response:
subject: Appreciation for the Detailed Response  

body:  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response. I hope this message finds you well.  

I would like to express my gratitude for the assistance provided.  

Regarding the current machine vision system, I believe there may be a misunderstanding concerning the model and the image sensor. The system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor as previously stated.  

I have attached the technical data to this email for your reference. Please find the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file for detailed specifications and the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, specifically page 13, for quantum efficiency information.  

I will review these files and manuals more thoroughly and will keep you informed of my findings.  

Thank you again for your support.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
